subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, O Illuminator of the world and Educator of the nations! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name through which hath thundered forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا منور العالم و معلم الامم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به هدرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
